TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Likavung, title = Likavung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Likavung} }

S.FORM: = Likavung = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Likavung. 466 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,247 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 69% niqan 857 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 31% niqan 390 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma54%, Amis7%, Paiwan3%, Bunun1%, Rukai2%, ni rahuq na o2%. Tnhangan alang Ôľ°lang Ri-cya Ri-kavung. Thyang alang Ga hana pglug pnhyugan Ri-cya se siida, hmuma sari ka seejiq hini, saw bunuh ka wasaw na, kiya o kari seejiq Rikavon ksun, kika tnhangan kari Rikavoka alang na da. Nniqan Tay-tung-seyn pey-nan-syang ri-cya cun. Klbangan Quri ddgiyaq kska Truma hunac hraan hidaw, daya ayug Ryuya. Lnglingay ti-ri breenux ayug qsiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Pey-nan. Jilan kari Kari Pey-nan,kari Tlu. Snhiyan utu Pnyahan alang Ida qbsuran Pey-nan ka smkagun kwan-yueyn mangal qyqaya tgaan cong-ci Ri-cya. Kiya ni, ada sdalih nniqan lnglingay seejiq Ru-kay Ta-nan-se, kika snruan kari o, niqan rudan sbiyaw ka kndadax C-pen-se thjil do, msdungus seejiq Ru-kay Ta-nan se ada ka sdalih Ru-kay Ta-nan-se kika mrana ka lutuc duri, asi nniq hini da. Seuxal o hbaraw seejiq ka paru alang nii, binaw nniq hngkawas 1897 (kuang-syu hngkawas 13), yasa muda naqih uuda ka Ryu-cya-wang o wada ungac da, dhuq bukuy klwaan Tanah Tunux siida prajing tutuy duri. Kklaan rgrigan Pnyahan bnatas Patas sbiyaw Pey-nan-cu. Pnatas Sung- lung-seng. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey- yueyn-hwey. Min-kwo hngkawas 87. klabuy 71-73. Endaan Tay-tung-syeyn sbiyaw: Pnatas Pey-nan-cu. Snluwan Cen- wun-te. Tay- tung-syeyn ceng-fu. Min-kwo hngkawas 90. Klabuy 130-135.
S.PHON: = lika*uŇč = gaga mniq tajtuŇč p…ônansjaŇč ka alaŇč lika*uŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, …ĺukai*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. tnńßaŇčan alaŇč *laŇč …ĺi- ¶ja …ĺi-ka*uŇč. tńßjaŇč alaŇč ga ńßana pglug pnńßjugan …ĺi- ¶ja s…ô siida, ńßmuma sa…ĺi ka s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini, saw bunuńß ka wasaw na, kija o ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺika*on ksun, kika tnńßaŇčan ka…ĺi …ĺika*oka alaŇč na da. nniqan taj-tuŇč-s…ôn p…ô-nan-sjaŇč …ĺi- ¶ja ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi ddgijaq kska t…ĺuma ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw, daja ajug …ĺjuja. lŇčliŇčaj ti-…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux ajug qsija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi p…ô-nan,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan utu pnjańßan alaŇč ida qbsu…ĺan p…ô-nan ka smkagun kwan-ju…ôn maŇčal qjqaja tgaan ¶oŇč- ¶i …ĺi- ¶ja. kija ni, ada sdalińß nniqan lŇčliŇčaj s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺu-kaj ta-nan-s…ô, kika sn…ĺuan ka…ĺi o, niqan …ĺudan sbijaw ka kndadax ¶-p…ôn-s…ô tńß…üil do, msduŇčus s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺu-kaj ta-nan s…ô ada ka sdalińß …ĺu-kaj ta-nan-s…ô kika m…ĺana ka lutu ¶ du…ĺi, asi nniq ńßini da. s…ôuxal o ńßba…ĺaw s…ô…ô…üiq ka pa…ĺu alaŇč nii, binaw nniq ńßŇčkawas **** (kuaŇč-sju ńßŇčkawas **), jasa muda naqińß uuda ka …ĺju- ¶ja-waŇč o wada uŇča ¶ da, dńßuq bukuj klwaan tanańß tunux siida p…ĺa…üiŇč tutuj du…ĺi. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan pnjańßan bnatas patas sbijaw p…ô-nan- ¶u. pnatas suŇč- luŇč-s…ôŇč. taj-wan-s…ôŇč wun-sj…ôn w…ô- ju…ôn-ńßw…ô. min-kwo ńßŇčkawas **. klabuj **-**. …ôndaan taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn sbijaw: pnatas p…ô-nan- ¶u. snluwan ¶…ôn- wun-t…ô. taj- tuŇč-sj…ôn ¶…ôŇč-*u. min-kwo ńßŇčkawas **. klabuj ***-***.
S.FORM: = Likavung = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Likavung. 466 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,247 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 69% niqan 857 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 31% niqan 390 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma54%, Amis7%, Paiwan3%, Bunun1%, Rukai2%, ni rahuq na o2%. Tnhangan alang Ôľ°lang Ri-cya Ri-kavung. Thyang alang Ga hana pglug pnhyugan Ri-cya se siida, hmuma sari ka seejiq hini, saw bunuh ka wasaw na, kiya o kari seejiq Rikavon ksun, kika tnhangan kari Rikavoka alang na da. Nniqan Tay-tung-seyn pey-nan-syang ri-cya cun. Klbangan Quri ddgiyaq kska Truma hunac hraan hidaw, daya ayug Ryuya. Lnglingay ti-ri breenux ayug qsiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Pey-nan. Jilan kari Kari Pey-nan,kari Tlu. Snhiyan utu Pnyahan alang Ida qbsuran Pey-nan ka smkagun kwan-yueyn mangal qyqaya tgaan cong-ci Ri-cya. Kiya ni, ada sdalih nniqan lnglingay seejiq Ru-kay Ta-nan-se, kika snruan kari o, niqan rudan sbiyaw ka kndadax C-pen-se thjil do, msdungus seejiq Ru-kay Ta-nan se ada ka sdalih Ru-kay Ta-nan-se kika mrana ka lutuc duri, asi nniq hini da. Seuxal o hbaraw seejiq ka paru alang nii, binaw nniq hngkawas 1897 (kuang-syu hngkawas 13), yasa muda naqih uuda ka Ryu-cya-wang o wada ungac da, dhuq bukuy klwaan Tanah Tunux siida prajing tutuy duri. Kklaan rgrigan Pnyahan bnatas Patas sbiyaw Pey-nan-cu. Pnatas Sung- lung-seng. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey- yueyn-hwey. Min-kwo hngkawas 87. klabuy 71-73. Endaan Tay-tung-syeyn sbiyaw: Pnatas Pey-nan-cu. Snluwan Cen- wun-te. Tay- tung-syeyn ceng-fu. Min-kwo hngkawas 90. Klabuy 130-135.
S.PHON: = lika*uŇč = gaga mniq tajtuŇč p…ônansjaŇč ka alaŇč lika*uŇč. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *,*** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, …ĺukai*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. tnńßaŇčan alaŇč *laŇč …ĺi- ¶ja …ĺi-ka*uŇč. tńßjaŇč alaŇč ga ńßana pglug pnńßjugan …ĺi- ¶ja s…ô siida, ńßmuma sa…ĺi ka s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini, saw bunuńß ka wasaw na, kija o ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺika*on ksun, kika tnńßaŇčan ka…ĺi …ĺika*oka alaŇč na da. nniqan taj-tuŇč-s…ôn p…ô-nan-sjaŇč …ĺi- ¶ja ¶un. klbaŇčan qu…ĺi ddgijaq kska t…ĺuma ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw, daja ajug …ĺjuja. lŇčliŇčaj ti-…ĺi b…ĺ…ô…ônux ajug qsija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ sjusan t…ôn- ¶ mniq alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq s…ô…ô…üiq p…ô-nan. …üilan ka…ĺi ka…ĺi p…ô-nan,ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan utu pnjańßan alaŇč ida qbsu…ĺan p…ô-nan ka smkagun kwan-ju…ôn maŇčal qjqaja tgaan ¶oŇč- ¶i …ĺi- ¶ja. kija ni, ada sdalińß nniqan lŇčliŇčaj s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺu-kaj ta-nan-s…ô, kika sn…ĺuan ka…ĺi o, niqan …ĺudan sbijaw ka kndadax ¶-p…ôn-s…ô tńß…üil do, msduŇčus s…ô…ô…üiq …ĺu-kaj ta-nan s…ô ada ka sdalińß …ĺu-kaj ta-nan-s…ô kika m…ĺana ka lutu ¶ du…ĺi, asi nniq ńßini da. s…ôuxal o ńßba…ĺaw s…ô…ô…üiq ka pa…ĺu alaŇč nii, binaw nniq ńßŇčkawas **** (kuaŇč-sju ńßŇčkawas **), jasa muda naqińß uuda ka …ĺju- ¶ja-waŇč o wada uŇča ¶ da, dńßuq bukuj klwaan tanańß tunux siida p…ĺa…üiŇč tutuj du…ĺi. kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan pnjańßan bnatas patas sbijaw p…ô-nan- ¶u. pnatas suŇč- luŇč-s…ôŇč. taj-wan-s…ôŇč wun-sj…ôn w…ô- ju…ôn-ńßw…ô. min-kwo ńßŇčkawas **. klabuj **-**. …ôndaan taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn sbijaw: pnatas p…ô-nan- ¶u. snluwan ¶…ôn- wun-t…ô. taj- tuŇč-sj…ôn ¶…ôŇč-*u. min-kwo ńßŇčkawas **. klabuj ***-***.
